body_txt: Sometimes in video games lacking the Law of Inverse Recoil , firing rapidly in a direction opposite to where you want to go will give you a good push sideways or even upward. While not possible with Real Life hand-held firearms (at least individually - if you could fire 30 or 40 simultaneously, that'd be a different story), there's a grain of Truth in Television — a few of the most powerful mounted machine guns and autocannons actually exert enough force to propel a vehicle, although they would also destroy large swaths of countryside in the process. Compare Nitro Boost , the more explosive Rocket Jump and Gas-Cylinder Rocket . Inverse of Weaponized Exhaust ; this is essentially Exhaustified Weapon. Improvised Microgravity Maneuvering is this trope Recycled IN SPACE! .
